'''datate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:puerilely|puerilely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puerilely|puerilely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| datate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:datate|datate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:datatesher|datatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:datatesherĂ«m|datatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:datatero|datatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:datateshĂ«|datateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:datateshĂ«m|datateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidatatero|gokidatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidatateshĂ«|gokidatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidatateshĂ«m|gokidatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godatankerom|godatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godatankeshĂ«|godatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godatankeshĂ«m|godatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godatankeya|godatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dataterom|dataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:datatemu|datatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:datateya|datateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidataterom|gokidataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidatatemu|gokidatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidatateya|gokidatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:datatate|datatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:datatatesher|datatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:datatatesherĂ«m|datatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:datatatero|datatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:datatateshĂ«|datatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:datatateshĂ«m|datatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidatatatero|gokidatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidatatateshĂ«|gokidatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidatatateshĂ«m|gokidatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godatatankerom|godatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godatatankeshĂ«|godatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godatatankeshĂ«m|godatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godatatankeya|godatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:datataterom|datataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:datatatemu|datatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:datatateya|datatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidatataterom|gokidatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidatatatemu|gokidatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidatatateya|gokidatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠtĂŠte|dĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠtĂŠtesher|dĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠtĂŠtero|dĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠtĂŠtero|gokidĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠtĂŠnkeya|godĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠtĂŠterom|dĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠtĂŠtemu|dĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠtĂŠteya|dĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠtĂŠteya|gokidĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:daftafte|daftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:daftaftesher|daftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daftaftesherĂ«m|daftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:daftaftero|daftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:daftafteshĂ«|daftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daftafteshĂ«m|daftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidaftaftero|gokidaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidaftafteshĂ«|gokidaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidaftafteshĂ«m|gokidaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godaftafnkerom|godaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godaftafnkeshĂ«|godaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godaftafnkeshĂ«m|godaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godaftafnkeya|godaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:daftafterom|daftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daftaftemu|daftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:daftafteya|daftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidaftafterom|gokidaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidaftaftemu|gokidaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidaftafteya|gokidaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
